msContents.summary: This edition of the Amarakoṣa was edited by Charles de Silva Batuwantudawe, and it includes a Sinhalese commentary. It seems to be the earliest print of the Sinhalese commentary, which was followed by Gunasekera and Wimalajoti Thero.

extent.measure: 1 unnumbered, 1–7, 1–203. The images of the preface are out of order.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: namassarvajñāya.
body.p:
he dhīrāḥ (yuṣmābhiḥ) akṣayaḥ saḥ śriyeca amṛtāyaca sevyatām, yanū
mehi kriyākāraka padasambandhayi; pan̆ḍitavariṇi topavisin kṣayabhāva
yakaṭa noyannāvū hētemē trivargasampat piṇisat nivan piṇi
sat sevinā læbēvā yanu artthayi.

agādhasya pātālatala rahitahō itāgæmburu; jñānadayāsindhoḥ, næṇa
kuḷuṇu sayuru bandu; yasya, yam utumekugē; guṇāḥ, prajñā kṛpādiguṇa
yō; anaghāḥ, pav·rahitahō nirdoṣada; akṣayaḥ saḥ, nirvvikāravū hēte
ma; śriyeca, trivargasampat piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, nivan piṇisada; dhīrāḥ,
pan̆ḍitavariṇi topavisin; sevyatām, sevunā læbēvā.

mē ślokaya budun·gē nairggika guṇānusmaraṇayen buddhasēvāva
karaṇulæbēvayi yana abhiprāyen kiyana ladæyi mē nāmaliṅgānuśāsa
nayehi artthakiyana væḍitara ācārīn·gē sammatayi ― brahmaviṣṇumahe
śādi sevā kiyanaladæyi samahara ācārīn·gē matayi ― bhaṭṭojidīkṣitā
cāryyātmaja bhānudīkṣitācārīn visin gurusevā dak·vana bavak mut
buddhasēvā noveyi amarācārīn saugatavīmehi hetunætæyi dæḍi
sē kiyati — mema ācārīn·gē druṣṭivirodhaheyin kiyana pamaṇak vinā
bhāratītomō gurusevā artthaya sphuṭa nokaran·nīya — maheśvaranam
ācārīn visin viracitavū amarakoṣa vivekanam vyākhyānayehi mē bu
ddhādi kisivek nodak·vā ślokārttha pamaṇak kiyati.
body.head: purātana sannaya.
body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayan·ṭa pūjāvidhānakaḷa kal·hi parahitānuśāsa
nayen vighnopaśamaya karannāvū puṇyasampattiya ræs·karannō;
“yasyajñānadayāsindhoḥ” yanādī mē solōvak dæk·vūhu ― jñāna, sama
stavastuviṣayavū parijñānayen·hā; dayā, duḥkhayen samuddharaṇavāñjā
lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak·vænivū nohot ukta
lakṣaṇavū jñānadayādedenāṭa vipulādhāraheyin sāgarayak·vænivū; a
gādhasya, anut visin pātālatala nodak·nālada jñānadayādedenā
gē keḷavara ætiheyin pirisin̆dagata nohækkāvū gāmbhīryya æti;
yasya, yam sarvvajñayak·hugē; guṇāḥ, maitrīkṣamopaśamādī guṇayō; a
naghāḥ, rāgādidoṣarahitayō da; he dhīrāḥ, pan̆ḍitavariṇi; akṣayaḥ, parama
karuṇādī guṇaśālitvayen parahita sukhasampādanayehilā kṣayak·næ
ttāvū hevat virāmayak nættāvū nohot saṃsārayen sundarasthā
nayaṭa giyabava hetukoṭageṇa ajarāmaraheyin kṣayak nættāvū
saḥ, ē sarvvajñatema; śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, ni
van piṇisada; sevyatām, topavisin sevinā læbēvā.

mē solōva sarvajñayan·gē sāgaratvayen rūpaṇayaheyin sarvajña
yan·ṭahā sāgarayaṭa śleṣayi; mehi samudrayāgē agādhatvanam pātālata
laya nodækkahæki bavaya; anaghavū guṇayōnam ratnākaratvādīhuya;
akṣayatvanam paripūrṇabavaya; śrīnam śrīdevatāya amṛtanam amāyayi da
tayutu “yasya jñāna dayāsindhoḥ” yanādiyen iṣṭadevatāśrīrvādadæk·vūhu
“śriyeca amṛtāyaca” yan·nen sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalapramāṇahe
yin pravṛttiphala dæk·vūhu.

mē solōvehi śleṣayen taman·karaṇa śāstra yāgēda svarūpa
kīha hēmesē datayutu ෴ jñānadayā, kavitvavaktṛtvādiyehihō
aṣṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadānasampattiya hetukoṭa geṇa; si
ndhoḥ, sāgarayak·vænivū; agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇayogaya he
tukoṭa geṇa patul·nodækkahækkāvū; yasya, yam·śāstrayak·hugē,
guṇāḥ, laghutva viṣpaṣṭatvādiguṇayō; anaghāḥ, śubhahetuhuda; hedhīrāḥ;
pan̆ḍitavariṇi; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ, ē jñānadayāsindhuvatemē he
vat mē nāmaliṅgānuśāsanayatema; śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada
nohot vāṅmaya śil·pa dænīmalakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārtthasampatti
ya taddhetukatrivarggahetuvū parārtthasampattīya yana mē svārtthasampat
parārtthasampat deka piṇisa da; amṛtāyaca, ē svārtthasampattiyenudu
puṇyajñānasambhārayen ayatnayen siddhavannāvū mokṣaya piṇisada;
sevyatām, śruticintāvyākhyānādilakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇu læbēvā.

mē śāstrapakṣayehi dānandāḥ yana vākyayehi ḍudāñ dāne yanadhā
tuhu keren (sampadādibhyaḥ) kvip·ca yi kvip·kaḷa kal·hi dā kiyā tibeyi
jñānasyadāḥ tasyā ī lakṣmī jñānadeyi vākyageṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsakoṭa jñā
nade śabdaya siddhakal·hi ohukeren tṛtīyā kaḷakala jñānadayā yi ki
yā rūpayaveyi datayutuyi.
